name: lumberyard
summary: An open-air or half-covered lumberyard. Stacks of cut boards sorted by size, rough logs awaiting sawing, a small office shack and a loading dock for wagons.

size_guidance.aspect_ratio: large rectangle with clear wagon-access on one long edge

accent.purpose: sawdust layer in the cutting area

primary_palette.note: classic yard — sorted boards, rough logs for splitting
retail yard — small office corner for sales

story_prompts: delivery morning — wagons loading, foreman tallying, buyers haggling
winter quiet — snow on the stacks, yard boss in the office shack
fire risk — dry summer, a careless pipe-smoker being ejected
theft overnight — a stack toppled, boards missing, dog dead

lighting_notes.ambient_intent: outdoor natural light — covered sections need lanterns

anti_patterns: stacks along edges leaving a wide central work path — don't clutter center
wagon access requires an unbroken edge — never block it with a prop
office is tiny, one or two cells — don't build a house
